productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men Power Howard Black Sports Shoes
description: Take outdoor training to the next level in these AdiPower Howard 2 shoes from adidas. Constructed for better comfort and cushioning, these sport shoes helps you master rugged terrain. Team these with jeans and a tee for great urban style. Upper Synthetic leather upper Reinforced overlay over heel cup for extra support to the back foot Reinforced overlay over toe box for durability and added protection to the forefoot Reinforced overlay at the midfoot region Central lace-ups for a customised Fit Padded and meshed tongue and collar for comfort Branding on the tongue and at the back of the collar Perforated pull loop for enhanced comfort Midsole Rubber midsole for enhanced comfortOutsoleTPR outsole with suction points at the forefoot and heel Brand name embossed on the forefoot shoe care Remove dust with soft, clean, damp cloth Do not machine wash
